zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Palmer II於1365年出生在英國素可斯易寧時，他的父親Robert Palmer26歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Stopham22歲。他和Anne Morne至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1406年在英國素可安莫林享年41歲，埋葬在英國素可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Palmer II于1365年出生在英国素可斯易寧时，他的父亲Robert Palmer26岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Stopham22岁。他和Anne Morne至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1406年在英国素可安莫林享年41岁，埋葬在英国素可。

nameMeanings.name: Palmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English palmer(e) ‘palmer, pilgrim to the Holy Land’ (Anglo-Norman French palmer, Old French pa(l)mer, paum(i)er), so called from the palm branch carried by such pilgrims. The term was also used to denote an itinerant monk who traveled from shrine to shrine under a vow of poverty. This surname is also common in Ireland, where it has been recorded from the 13th century onward.
Irish: when not of English origin (see 1 above), a surname adopted for Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair (see Milford ), the name of an ecclesiastical family.
Swedish (mainly Palmér): ornamental name formed with palm ‘palm tree’ + the suffix -ér (a derivative of Latin -erius) or -er (from German).

variants.name: Milford
meanings: English (mainly Devon): habitational name from any of the many places called Milford, deriving from Old English myln ‘mill’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish (Antrim and Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair ‘descendant of Maolgfhoghmhair’, a personal name meaning ‘chief of harvest’. The Irish name was first Anglicized as Mullover, which was later assimilated to Milford. See also Palmer .

variants.name: Palmiere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Dante, Enrico, Nicola, Salvatore, Vittorio.

variants.name: Palmore
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Palmer   or an Americanized form of South German   Balmer  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Palmer II was born in 1365, in Steyning, Sussex, England, his father, Robert Palmer, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Anne Morne. He died in 1406, in Angmering, Sussex, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Palmer II est né en 1365, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Palmer, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Anne Morne. Il est décédé en 1406, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Palmer II 1365 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Palmer 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Stopham 22. Er hatte mit Anne Morne mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1406 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Angmering, Sussex, England und wurde in Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Palmer II è nato il nel 1365 nel Steyning, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Robert Palmer, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Anne Morne. Morì nel 1406, nel Angmering, Sussex, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Palmer IIが1365年にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父Robert Palmerは26歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Stophamは22歳であった。彼はAnne Morneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1406年にイギリススセックスアングメリングで41歳で死去し，イギリススセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Palmer II(이)가 1365년 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Palmer(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Stopham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Anne Morne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 영국 수세스 앤그머잉에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Palmer II nasceu em 1365, em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Palmer, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Anne Morne. Ele faleceu em 1406, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Palmer II родился в 1365 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Palmer было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Anne Morne. Он умер в 1406 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Palmer II nació en 1365, en Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Palmer, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Stopham, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Anne Morne. Murió en 1406, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Sussex, Inglaterra.
